text: Excited to announce our Series A funding round! We've raised $10M to accelerate growth and expand our product offerings. Huge thanks to our investors and team for making this possible. The journey ahead is bright. #startup #funding #B2B

Product update: we just shipped async collaboration — our most-requested feature. Teams can now work across time zones without losing context. Built by an amazing team in just 6 weeks. Shipping fast is our superpower.
We're hiring! Looking for senior engineers who care about developer experience. Remote-first, competitive comp, real ownership. Apply in comments or DM me directly.
